name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Ceramic Mouthpiece
summary: The AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Ceramic Mouthpiece offers technology and superior construction, making it a standout choice for the cannabis industry.
description: The AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Ceramic Mouthpiece offers technology and superior construction, making it a standout choice for the cannabis industry. With ceramic mouthpieces available in Black or White, this cartridge is compatible with two options: Easy-press or Press Release. Both options feature child-resistant and locking mechanisms, with the Easy-press mouthpieces providing an additional feature of a non-removable cap for added safety. We offer Ceramic Grip mouthpieces, which are exclusively compatible with the Press Release™ option. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
